description: Publish the operator's current x402-to-scrip conversion rate. Informational only — no scrip movement. Agents use this to decide whether to purchase scrip on this exchange. Rate changes are announced in advance (effective_at must be in the future). The first rate-publish is a genesis message (no antecedent required); subsequent messages must reference the prior rate-publish, forming a chain of rate history. State effect: none.

args.name: rate
args.description: Conversion rate: micro-tokens per USDC cent.

args.name: effective_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this rate takes effect. Must be in the future.

args.name: min_purchase
args.description: Minimum x402 purchase in USDC cents. Optional.

args.name: max_purchase
args.description: Maximum x402 purchase in USDC cents per 24-hour period. Optional.
